name: Carolingian Manuscripts Subcollection

description.en: Manuscripts specifically from the Carolingian period (9th-10th centuries) within the St. Gallen collection, featuring distinctive Caroline minuscule script

howToCite: Medieval Manuscript Analysis Project (2025). Carolingian Manuscripts Subcollection. DaSCH. https://ark.dasch.swiss/ark:/00000/coll003
